creator: neal@nicandneal.net
text:
On 2011-08-21, at 09:10 , Edwin Groothuis wrote:

> Maintainer of devel/py-twistedCore,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/159954 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/159954
> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
> 

Please go ahead and commit this update.

Thanks.
